Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">&quot;map fst (alist_of (Abs_pq (insort_key snd (k, p) (alist_of q)))) = map fst (insort_key snd (k, p) (alist_of q))&quot;<br/>```<br/></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>## Theorem statement</b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/>```isabelle<br/></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>theorem </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">push_commute: </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#009966;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>assumes </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">a1:&quot;a \&lt;noteq&gt; b&quot; </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#009966;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>and </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">a2: &quot;v \&lt;noteq&gt; w&quot;<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#009966;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>shows </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">&quot;push w b (push v a q) = push v a (push w b q)&quot;<br/>```<br/></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>## Formal proof</b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/>```isabelle<br/></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>theorem </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">push_commute: assumes a1:&quot;a \&lt;noteq&gt; b&quot; </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#009966;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>and </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">a2: &quot;v \&lt;noteq&gt; w&quot;<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#009966;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>shows </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">&quot;push w b (push v a q) = push v a (push w b q)&quot;<br/></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>proof </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">-<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#b22222;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"> (* Step 1: Unfolding the definition of push *)</font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>have </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">&quot;push w b (push v a q) = Abs_pq (if w \&lt;notin&gt; set (values (push v a q)) then insort_key snd (w, b) (alist_of (push v a q)) <br/> else alist_of (push v a q))&quot;<br/> unfolding push_def values_def by auto<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>also </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>have </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">&quot;... = Abs_pq (if w \&lt;notin&gt; set (values q @ [v]) then insort_key snd (w, b) (alist_of (push v a q)) <br/> else alist_of (push v a q))&quot;<br/> unfolding values_def push_def </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#ff0000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b> /*@ &gt;&gt;&gt; lemma &lt;&lt;&lt; */</b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>also </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>have </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">&quot;... = Abs_pq (if w \&lt;notin&gt; set (values q) then insort_key snd (w, b) (alist_of q @ [(v, a)]) else alist_of q)&quot; <br/> unfolding values_def push_def sorry<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#b22222;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">(* Step 2: Analyzing the values of the inner push *)</font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>also </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>have </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">&quot;... = Abs_pq (if w \&lt;notin&gt; set (values q) then insort_key snd (w, b) (alist_of q) else alist_of q)&quot;<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>proof </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">(cases &quot;v \&lt;in&gt; set (values q)&quot;)<br/> case True<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>then </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">have &quot;values (push v a q) = values q&quot; sorry<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>then </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">show ?thesis sorry<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>next</b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/> case False<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>then </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">have &quot;values (push v a q) = values q @ [v]&quot; sorry<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>then </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">show ?thesis sorry<br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>qed</b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#b22222;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1">(* Step 3: Analyzing the values of the outer push *)</font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/> </font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#006699;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>finally </b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/>```<br/>Unproved: Abs_pq (if w \&lt;notin&gt; set (values (push v a q)) then insort_key snd (w, b) (alist_of (push v a q)) else alist_of (push v a q)<br/>)=Abs_pq (if w \&lt;notin&gt; set (values q @ [v]) then insort_key snd (w, b) (alist_of (push v a q)) else alist_of (push v a q))In Isabelle<br/>, this step cannot be verified by sledgehammer because the reasoning rules are either unclear or the reasoning gap is too large.<br/></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><b>## Previous lemma</b></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/>Thought1:<br/>In order to properly justify the step `... = Abs_pq (if w \&lt;notin&gt; set (values q @ [v]) then insort_key snd (w, b) (alist_of ....<br/>### lemma:<br/>```isabelle<br/></font><font style="font-size:10.58px;font-family:Times New Roman;color:#000000;direction:ltr;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:120%;opacity:1"><br/>Thought1:<br/>It is clear that the lemmas `alist_of_push`is not provable as stated. In order to make progress, we need to revise these lemmas ...<br/>The revised lemma captures the behavior of `alist_of` when applied to the result of the `push` operation.
